questions.question: What is the mirror image (left-right reversal) of the word 'WATER'?
questions.solution: Step 1: Reverse letter order left-to-right. Step 2: WATER → RETAW. Answer: RETAW.

questions.question: What is the mirror image (left-right reversal) of the word 'IMAGE'?
questions.solution: Step 1: Reverse letter order left-to-right. Step 2: IMAGE → EGAMI. Answer: EGAMI.

questions.question: What is the mirror image (left-right reversal) of the word 'REFLECT'?
questions.solution: Step 1: Reverse letter order left-to-right. Step 2: REFLECT → TCELFER. Answer: TCELFER.

questions.solution: Step 1: Reverse letter order left-to-right. Step 2: LOGIC → CIGOL. Answer: CIGOL.

questions.solution: Step 1: Reverse letter order left-to-right. Step 2: REASON → NOSAER. Answer: NOSAER.
